wiki.summary: "WHERE IS MY HUSBAND!" is a song by British singer and songwriter RAYE. It was released on September 2025 through Human Re Sources as part of her upcoming sophomore studio project, THIS MUSIC MAY CONTAIN HOPE., set for release in March 2026. The track was written by RAYE alongside Mike Sabath and Jonny Coffer, with production handled by Sabath and Coffer. Musically, the song blends elements of R&B and soul with theatrical pop influences, showcasing RAYE’s storytelling approach and vocal dynamism. Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: "WHERE IS MY HUSBAND!" is a song by British singer and songwriter RAYE. It was released on September 2025 through Human Re Sources as part of her upcoming sophomore studio project, THIS MUSIC MAY CONTAIN HOPE., set for release in March 2026. The track was written by RAYE alongside Mike Sabath and Jonny Coffer, with production handled by Sabath and Coffer. Musically, the song blends elements of R&B and soul with theatrical pop influences, showcasing RAYE’s storytelling approach and vocal dynamism. The song was first teased by RAYE in August 2025 during a series of live performances across Europe, where short snippets circulated online and quickly went viral on TikTok for its dramatic narrative and raw delivery. On August 28, 2025, she officially announced the single via her social media platforms, revealing the title and sharing the cover art. Pre-save links became available the same day through her official website. Read more on Last.fm.
